SUBJECT: <%= agentName %> reached <%= thresholdPct %>% of its <%= scopeLabel %>
INTRO: One of your AI agents has reached a spend threshold you configured.
BODY: Click below to open the agent in your account and raise the limit, pause the agent, or adjust its settings. The link signs you into your FastComments account directly.
FALLBACK_LINK: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser: <%= manageUrl %>
